criteria.name: AI-Powered Tools
criteria.description: Presence and sophistication of AI-driven features like generative fill, object removal, sky replacement, AI-based video analysis, and smart suggestions.

criteria.name: User Accessibility
criteria.description: Ease of use for both beginners and professionals, including intuitive interfaces, simplified complex tasks, and readily available templates.

criteria.name: Editing Efficiency
criteria.description: Speed and efficiency in performing complex tasks such as retouching, color correction, video summarization, and automatic subtitle generation.

criteria.name: Versatility
criteria.description: Ability to cater to a wide range of users, including content creators, businesses, educators, and social media marketers, with diverse editing needs.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Variety of features available, including but not limited to: AI-powered enhancements, object removal, background replacement, style transfer, filters, keyframe suggestions, subtitle generation, and format support.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: Pricing plans and availability of free versions, trials, or affordable subscription options.
